claim_boundary: This is the paper-side 3D spatial chart receipt: S2 cap/conformal geometry plus a computed finite modular-clock receipt yields the SO+(3,1) Lorentz branch and the H3 spatial chart of dimension 3. The receipt tier is chart-level; issue #309 primitive-field chart certification uses CAP_NORMAL_H3_CHART_RECEIPT. A declared 2pi target is reported only as SIMULATION_ASSUMED_* visualization data. BW3 finite cap-net evidence, populated third-person bulk, particle, and physical CMB claims require separate gates.
